title: Problem creating automatic-indexes on sub-queries in the FROM clause of correlated scalar sub-queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x VARCHAR(255), z FLOAT, y INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
CREATE VIEW vvv AS SELECT x, SUM(z) AS total_z FROM t1 GROUP BY x;
SELECT (SELECT total_z FROM vvv WHERE x='aaa') AS total_sum;
key_bug_features: Automatic index on view discards duplicate rows
